## Validation

Describe how the change was reviewed or validated.

- [ ] Links and Markdown were checked where relevant
- [ ] Terraform examples use placeholders and are not environment-specific
- [ ] Security guidance includes assumptions or caveats where needed

## Safety Check

- [ ] No real AWS account IDs, ARNs, usernames, emails, domains, or IP ranges were added
- [ ] No credentials, secrets, state files, logs, or customer data were added
- [ ] Any new examples are generic enough for a public reference repository
